scripts.start: conc -n redis,django,maildev,mocksaml,frontend,libraries -c auto "npm run redis" "npm run runserver" "npm run maildev" "npm run mocksaml" "npm run frontend" "npm run libraries"
scripts.start:debug: conc -n redis,maildev,mocksaml,frontend,libraries -c auto "npm run redis" "npm run maildev" "npm run mocksaml" "npm run frontend" "npm run libraries"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:libraries
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:libraries
scripts.init:db: cd src && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py load_initial_data && python manage.py install_html_library && python manage.py createsuperuser
scripts.test:backend: cd src && poetry run python manage.py test
scripts.check:security:npm: npm audit --audit-level=moderate || (echo "WARNING: npm audit found vulnerabilities (non-blocking)." && true)
scripts.check:security:python: cd src && poetry run pip-audit || (echo "WARNING: pip-audit found vulnerabilities (non-blocking)." && true)
scripts.check:security: npm run check:security:npm && npm run check:security:python
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run check:security && npm run test
